hero.title: LenserFight
hero.subtitle: The arena, in your pocket. The mobile app is in active development inside the monorepo — and we need contributors to bring it to life.

contribute.title: Set up the mobile project locally.
contribute.subtitle: The app is an Expo project inside an Nx monorepo. You don't need to know Nx deeply — just follow these steps.

0.title: Fork & clone the repo
0.description: The mobile app lives at apps/mobile inside the Nx monorepo.

1.title: Install dependencies
1.description: Uses pnpm workspaces — all packages are hoisted at the root.

2.title: Start the Expo dev server
2.description: Opens Expo Go. Scan the QR code with your phone or run on a simulator.

3.title: Find your feature
3.description: Components, screens, and navigation are all inside apps/mobile/src.

items.0: iOS & Android screens for battles and lenses
items.4: Dark / light theme tokens (already exist in libs/ui)

cta.title: Pick an issue and ship it.
cta.description: Browse open issues labelled mobile on GitHub. All skill levels welcome — from UI tweaks to full feature screens.
